records.m_Talk_ENG: that this employee, whom you'd been giving a lot of thought to, was absolutely necessary for the future ahead.

records.m_Talk_ENG: that you'll be with her, no matter the consequences.

records.m_Talk_DEU: sie an dich zu binden, egal was auch geschieht.
records.m_Talk_FRA: de rester 95p ses c9580t959s et la soutenir, peu importe les cons959quences.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Having decided that, you called her to your office. She said she'd be here soon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Also hast du sie in dein B9588ro gerufen. Sie sagte, sie wolle bald da sein.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fort de cette d959cision, vous l'avez convoqu959e dans votre bureau. Elle ne devrait pas tarder.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fu fuu. What kind of stupid expression is that? Are you bored because I agreed without hesitation?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fu fuu. What kind of stupid expression is that? Are you bored because I agreed without hesitation?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fu fuu. What kind of stupid expression is that? Are you bored because I agreed without hesitation?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've read everything in detail. I'm telling you that I do not mind being bossed around as your employee.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've read everything in detail. I'm telling you that I do not mind being bossed around as your employee.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've read everything in detail. I'm telling you that I do not mind being bossed around as your employee.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I was curious to see what attitude you would have toward me once you had me at your mercy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I was curious to see what attitude you would have toward me once you had me at your mercy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I was curious to see what attitude you would have toward me once you had me at your mercy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: However, don't expect me to be truly loyal to you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: However, don't expect me to be truly loyal to you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: However, don't expect me to be truly loyal to you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I will obey any order you give me, and so will my subordinates... but I have no intention of allowing variables such as personal emotions in this experiment.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I will obey any order you give me, and so will my subordinates... but I have no intention of allowing variables such as personal emotions in this experiment.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I will obey any order you give me, and so will my subordinates... but I have no intention of allowing variables such as personal emotions in this experiment.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've always wanted to study you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've always wanted to study you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've always wanted to study you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I want to know what you are and what decisions you will make when humanity reaches a crossroads.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I want to know what you are and what decisions you will make when humanity reaches a crossroads.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I want to know what you are and what decisions you will make when humanity reaches a crossroads.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I want to observe you as closely as I can with my own eyes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I want to observe you as closely as I can with my own eyes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I want to observe you as closely as I can with my own eyes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you're still fine with this kind of relationship, I'll leave the final decision to you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you're still fine with this kind of relationship, I'll leave the final decision to you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you're still fine with this kind of relationship, I'll leave the final decision to you.
